synonyms.name: gonad of female organism reproductive system
gonad of genitalia of female organism
gonad of reproductive system of female organism
gonada of female organism reproductive system
gonada of genitalia of female organism
gonada of reproductive system of female organism
reproductive system of female organism gonad
reproductive system of female organism gonada

definitions.definition: One of the paired female reproductive glands containing the ova or germ cells; the ovary's stroma is a vascular connective tissue containing numbers of ovarian follicles enclosing the ova.
The gonad of a female organism which contains germ cells.
The pair of female reproductive glands in which the ova, or eggs, are formed. The ovaries are located in the pelvis, one on each side of the uterus.
